programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Joe Dickie is an award-winning photographer and filmmaker with a love of upland bird hunting. But he’s never hunted the greatest of all upland game birds: the wild turkey. What better place to be sworn into the Turkey POSSE than the Black Hills of South Dakota? This hunt is full of ups, downs, stubborn gobblers, and a loud-mouthed hen that puts on an unforgettable show.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Turkey hunting in the Deep South is infamous for hard-to-hunt gobblers. The Turkey POSSE heads to Mississippi where they get schooled and can’t scratch out a gobbler to save their lives. They move over to Georgia for opening day and continue to struggle, but eventually a lone gobbler caves and slips into range for the Savage Renegauge. This hunt also brings us on a flashback to much more promising turkey hunting in Minnesota, where the POSSE runs into a pile of northern longbeards.

programme.title: Turkey Posse

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park

programme.title: Blue World Ep604: Exploring Devil's Hole Cave in Nevada, USA
programme.desc: One of the largest aquifers in the United States is located directly beneath Death Valley. Blue World is invited to join a team of scientists working at Devil’s Hole Cave in Nevada and is afforded a once-in-a-lifetime permit from the National Park Service to dive in Devil’s Hole Cave. Fewer than 20 people have ever been allowed to dive in this otherworldly cave system.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: Fighting Deputy - 1937 48 m
programme.desc: A determined deputy sheriff sets out to stop a gang of outlaws terrorizing a frontier town. As he investigates the crimes and tracks the criminals, he uncovers a larger scheme behind the violence and works to bring the law back to the troubled community.

programme.title: Roll Along, Cowboy (1937
programme.desc: A drifting cowboy becomes involved in a conflict between ranchers and outlaws, working to protect the innocent and uncover a scheme of deception and violence while bringing the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Forbidden Trails 1941
programme.desc: The Rough Riders ride again in Forbidden Trails! When Marshal Buck Roberts (Buck Jones) is gunned down and badly wounded, he refuses to quit the fight. With fellow lawmen Tim McCoy and Raymond Hatton at his side, the trio saddles up to take on a ruthless gang terrorizing the frontier. Packed with blazing six-gun action, camaraderie, and justice served Western-style, this thrilling chapter in the Rough Riders series delivers nonstop excitement.

programme.title: The Fighting Westerner

programme.title: Idaho

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.

programme.title: The Brand of Hate
programme.desc: Trouble starts when Bill Larkins and his two sons move in with his brother Joe. They start rustling cattle and then kill Rod's father with Joe's gun. The Sheriff and Rod think they did it and are after proof.
